name: Southwestern Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boneless beef sirloin, chili grind
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, onions, and garlic in a bowl and mix well.
2. Heat 2 cups of peanut oil in a Dutch oven over high heat.
3. Add one-third of the meat mixture and brown it thoroughly.
4. Remove from pan and set aside.
5. Repeat with remaining oil and meat.
6. Combine browned beef mixture with remaining ingredients in the Dutch oven over moderate heat.
7. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 2 hours.
8. Serve hot.
